pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes the downloaded file to this path.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for this output file path.
export_result.sh parses the output DIMAP XML and searches for a BAND_NAME matching 'ndvi'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Landsat multispectral satellite image downloaded from the opengeos GitHub dataset repository to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The evaluation scripts explicitly verify the creation of a BEAM-DIMAP product at /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_masked_ndvi.dim and parse its XML file to ensure a band named 'NDVI' was created with a modified valid_pixel_expression.
